items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 114.3 mph at a 4.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Seattle Mariners, KC 8, SEA 6. Salvador Perez led the night, 3-4 | 3 RBI, R in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 114.3 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Mariners Recap
